records.question: Which students named Robenia have an email of rfourmano@hku.hk, are type TPG, have a GPA of 3.5, and an intelligence level of 2?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.student_id FROM student
WHERE student.email = 'rfourmano@hku.hk' AND student.type = 'TPG' AND student.gpa = 3.5 AND student.f_name = 'Robenia' AND student.intelligence = 2
records.pred_sql: SELECT student_id FROM student WHERE email = 'rfourmano@hku.hk' AND type = 'TPG' AND gpa = 3.5 AND f_name = 'Robenia' AND intelligence = 2

records.question: Which students have the type exactly RPG and an email exactly ospratlingf@outlook.com?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.student_id FROM student
WHERE student.type = 'RPG' AND student.email = 'ospratlingf@outlook.com'
records.pred_sql: SELECT student_id FROM student WHERE type = 'RPG' AND email = 'ospratlingf@outlook.com'

records.question: Which students are enrolled in the course where the name is Advanced Database Systems?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.student_id FROM student
JOIN registration ON student.student_id = registration.student_id
JOIN course ON registration.course_id = course.course_id
WHERE course.name = 'Advanced Database Systems'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.student_id FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T3.name = 'Advanced Database Systems'

records.question: Which students named Oliy with phone number (279) 1216435 and a GPA of 2.6 have a RA with a salary of med and capability of at least 3?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.student_id FROM student
JOIN ra ON student.student_id = ra.student_id
WHERE student.phone_number = '(279) 1216435' AND student.gpa = 2.6 AND student.f_name = 'Oliy' AND ra.salary = 'med' AND ra.capability >= 3
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.student_id FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN RA AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id WHERE T1.phone_number = '(279) 1216435' AND T1.gpa = 2.6 AND T1.f_name = 'Oliy' AND T2.salary = 'med' AND T2.capability >= 3

records.question: What students named Willie Rechert, with the email wrechert5@columbia.edu, phone number (781) 2506820, and a GPA of exactly 2.9 have a ra capability of at least 2 and where the ra salary is free?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.student_id FROM student
JOIN ra ON student.student_id = ra.student_id
WHERE ra.capability >= 2 AND student.phone_number = '(781) 2506820' AND student.gpa = 2.9 AND student.f_name = 'Willie' AND student.l_name = 'Rechert' AND student.email = 'wrechert5@columbia.edu' AND ra.salary = 'free'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.student_id FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN RA AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id WHERE T1.phone_number = '(781) 2506820' AND T1.gpa = 2.9 AND T1.f_name = 'Willie' AND T1.l_name = 'Rechert' AND T1.email = 'wrechert5@columbia.edu' AND T2.capability >= 2 AND T2.salary = 'free'

records.question: Which students named Grover Rosell have a salary of med and a registration SAT score of at least 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.student_id FROM student
JOIN ra ON student.student_id = ra.student_id
JOIN registration ON student.student_id = registration.student_id
WHERE registration.sat >= 1 AND student.l_name = 'Rosell' AND student.f_name = 'Grover' AND ra.salary = 'med'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.student_id FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN RA AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN registration AS T3 ON T1.student_id = T3.student_id WHERE T1.l_name = 'Rosell' AND T1.f_name = 'Grover' AND T2.salary = 'med' AND T3.sat >= 1

records.question: Which students have a first name exactly equal to 'Ingar', have at least one related ra record with capability at least 4, and have at least one related registration record?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.student_id FROM student
JOIN ra ON student.student_id = ra.student_id
JOIN registration ON student.student_id = registration.student_id
WHERE ra.capability >= 4 AND student.f_name = 'Ingar'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.student_id FROM student AS T1 WHERE T1.f_name = 'Ingar' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM RA AS T2 WHERE T1.student_id = T2.student_id AND T2.capability >= 4 ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM registration AS T3 WHERE T1.student_id = T3.student_id )

records.question: What students named Flor Benkhe have a phone number of (308) 9646371, are type RPG, have a GPA of 3.1, an email of fbenkhee@hku.hk, and intelligence at most 3?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.student_id FROM student
WHERE student.l_name = 'Benkhe' AND student.phone_number = '(308) 9646371' AND student.type = 'RPG' AND student.intelligence <= 3 AND student.f_name = 'Flor' AND student.gpa = 3.1 AND student.email = 'fbenkhee@hku.hk'
records.pred_sql: SELECT student_id FROM student WHERE l_name = 'Benkhe' AND phone_number = '(308) 9646371' AND type = 'RPG' AND intelligence <= 3 AND f_name = 'Flor' AND gpa = 3.1 AND email = 'fbenkhee@hku.hk'

records.question: What students with the email hczaja8@hku.hk and last name Czaja are type TPG, have intelligence at most 2, receive a high RA salary, and earned an A grade with a SAT score of 5 in their registration?

JOIN registration ON student.student_id = registration.student_id
WHERE student.email = 'hczaja8@hku.hk' AND student.type = 'TPG' AND student.intelligence <= 2 AND student.l_name = 'Czaja' AND ra.salary = 'high' AND registration.grade = 'A' AND registration.sat = 5
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.student_id FROM student AS T1 WHERE T1.email = 'hczaja8@hku.hk' AND T1.type = 'TPG' AND T1.intelligence <= 2 AND T1.l_name = 'Czaja' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM RA AS T2 WHERE T1.student_id = T2.student_id AND T2.salary = 'high' ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM registration AS T3 WHERE T1.student_id = T3.student_id AND T3.grade = 'A' AND T3.sat = 5 )
